title: Ukraine's Pulverizing Long-Range Strike Campaign
text:
The Russia Contingency with Michael Kofman
A bi-weekly podcast featuring in-depth analysis of Russia's military power and the war in Ukraine, with your favorite expert on the topic.

Become a member

Ukraine’s Pulverizing Long-Range Strike Campaign
The Russia Contingency with Michael Kofman
Michael Kofman and Nicole Wiley
July 10, 2026

Sign up now and start listening to "The Russia Contingency with Michael Kofman!"Already a member? Sign In to have access to our podcasts

Episode Notes:
Ukraine and Russia have escalated their long-range strike campaigns against key energy and logistics infrastructure, with recent strikes penetrating deeper and more frequently into both capitals' regions. In this episode, Nicole interviews Mike to unpack the logic behind Ukraine's expanded offensive strike strategy, what these strikes could mean for the coming fall and winter seasons, and why the timing of these large, long-range strikes have coincided with the NATO summit.
